title: Wax Melts - Frankincense and Myrrh | 16 Pack | Strong Scented | Made in The UK | Plastic Free | Vegan
features: FRANKINCENSE AND MYRRH WAX MELTS - a dark, mystical fragrance with notes of frankincense, tuberose, violets, myrrh and amber

LONG LASTING 16 PACK AND UP TO 96 HOURS OF FRAGRANCE - each 6.5g wax melts packs a real punch with up to 6 hours of scent per melt. Prefer a weaker scent just use 1/2 or use 2 melts for a stronger longer lasting fragrance. Suitable for tealight wax burners and electric wax warmers (ideally 40watts).
PLASTIC FREE AND COMPOSTABLE PACKAGING - we hate plastic so all packaging used is FSC certified and we even use compostable inner lining sheets to be totally eco friendly.
VEGAN AND VEGETARIAN FRIENDLY - we only use the highest quality cruelty free soy wax and paraben free fragrances for a superior clean burn and excellent scent throw.

MADE IN BRITAIN - all our wax melts are made here in Manchester by hand in our small family run business. Our suppliers are all in the UK too and pride themselves on manufacturing the highest quality materials.
description: Product description How To Use - Take a heart wax melt and place it in your wax melter. Either light a 4 hour tea light or switch on your electric burner. Enjoy the fragrance filling your home as the wax gently melts. Each melt will last up to 6 hours and sometimes longer depending on the individual fragrance and the type of burner you are using (burners and tea lights can produce different results). Once the scent is no longer noticeable remove the wax and dispose of it carefully in your general waste bin. Safety Warning Make sure that the candle does not burn unattended and is not lit for more than 4 hours at a time. Keep the candle away from flammable materials and make sure it stands on a sturdy, heat-resistant surface. Do not let the candle burn until the end and dispose of the leftovers safely.
